name: Cranberry-Chile Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Lee Kum Kee Chili paste
1/4 cup chopped red bell pepper (stem and seeds removed)
1 red jalapeno chile, stem and seeds removed, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, reduce the heat, and simmer for 45 minutes, or until the sauce is thick.
3. Cool and refrigerate.
4. Serve as a condiment with meat dishes or use as a sandwich spread. Heat level: Medium
